headline: New Jersey American Water Reminds Customers of Ongoing Assistance Programs as Winter Termination Period Concludes
summary: As New Jersey's annual Winter Termination Program concludes on March 15, New Jersey American Water is reminding customers that a variety of long-standing assistance programs remain available year-round to help eligible households manage their water and wastewater bills.
